name: Bellevue Youth Theatre - A Midsummer Night's Dream Day Camp
description: Two-week theater day camp at Bellevue Youth Theatre rehearsing and performing a youth version of Shakespeare's A Midsummer Night's Dream. Mondays through Fridays 9:30 AM to 3 PM (no camp July 3). Campers explore acting, ensemble, and stagecraft and present a final performance. Extended care 8-9:30 AM and 3-5:30 PM available for an additional fee.

name: Bellevue Youth Theatre - Jack and the Beanstalk Day Camp
description: Two-week theater day camp at Bellevue Youth Theatre rehearsing and performing a youth retelling of Jack and the Beanstalk. Mondays through Fridays 9:30 AM to 3 PM. Acting, ensemble, and stagecraft instruction culminating in a performance. Extended care 8-9:30 AM and 3-5:30 PM available for an additional fee.

name: Bellevue Youth Theatre - The Tortoise and Hare Day Camp
description: Two-week theater day camp at Bellevue Youth Theatre rehearsing and performing a musical retelling of The Tortoise and the Hare. Mondays through Fridays 9:30 AM to 3 PM. Campers work on acting, singing, and ensemble building. Extended care 8-9:30 AM and 3-5:30 PM available for an additional fee.

name: Bellevue Youth Theatre - Tech to the Future (Backstage Camp)
description: One-week backstage tech theater day camp at Bellevue Youth Theatre for ages 12-19. Mondays through Fridays 9:30 AM to 3 PM. Campers learn lighting, sound, costume, and prop effects work used to bring stage productions to life. Extended care is not available for this camp.

name: Bellevue Youth Theatre - Playmaking Camp
description: One-week play-writing and theater day camp at Bellevue Youth Theatre. Mondays through Fridays 9:30 AM to 3 PM. Campers learn plot, character development, and script writing while collaborating to create new short plays performed for families at the end of the week. Extended care 8-9:30 AM and 3-5:30 PM available for an additional fee.
